title: microchilus querceticola
intro: Microchilus querceticola is a plant species in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the yellow orchid tree. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, headache, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Microchilus querceticola include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help in reducing pain and inflammation, as well as protecting against oxidative stress. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for its herbal remedies, which can be made by steeping the leaves or roots in hot water to release its active compounds.
